Email triage hourly cron - 19:36 AEST 1 May fire. SDK fork form, no prior context.

WINDOW OVERRIDE: Tate is OFF-GRID for 72h autonomous window 1-4 May 2026. Per ~/ecodiaos/patterns/no-client-contact-without-tate-goahead.md, ANY outbound to client/external requires Tate's explicit per-message authorisation. DRAFT ONLY for client/external. Send only for trivial internal-Ecodia notifications.

POLICY:
a) NEWSLETTERS/MARKETING/SPAM → gmail_archive
b) TRANSACTIONAL → gmail_archive. If financiall
